segments.text_markup:
[grave, measured] The year is eighteen sixty-five. <break time="650ms"/>
Across a nation still bleeding from war, [breathe] a single shot would change EVERYTHING.
<break time="800ms"/> No one in that theater knew it yet.

Washington had survived the war.
Lincoln had survived the war.
<break time="1s"/> But survival, it turned out, was not the same as safety.
